SEARCH
程序包 User

类 Kid

java.lang.Object
User.User
User.Kid
public class Kid extends User
Represents a child user in a system where users may have different roles and attributes. This class extends the generic User class, adding specific properties that relate to a child user, such as a parent's email. It manages the child's accounts and tasks which can be assigned or supervised by a parent.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Kid(String email, String name, ArrayList<Account> accounts, ArrayList<Task> taskList, String parentEmail)

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Kid

      public Kid(String email, String name, ArrayList<Account> accounts, ArrayList<Task> taskList, String parentEmail)
      Constructs a new Kid instance with specified details. This constructor initializes a child user with their email, name, list of accounts, list of tasks, and parent's email.
      参数:
      email - The child's email address, used as a unique identifier within the system.
      name - The child's full name.
      accounts - A list of Account objects representing the financial accounts the child has access to.
      taskList - A list of Task objects representing tasks assigned to or created by the child.
      parentEmail - The parent's email address, used for linking the child to their parent's account and for notifications.

  • 方法详细资料

    • getParentEmail

      public String getParentEmail()
      Retrieves the parent's email address. This method is typically used when the system needs to send notifications or requires parental approval.
      返回:
      The email address of the parent associated with this child.

    • setParentEmail

      public void setParentEmail(String parentEmail)
      Sets or updates the parent's email address for this child. This method allows updating the parent's email, which can be used for notifications or linking the child to a new parent.
      参数:
      parentEmail - The new parent email to be associated with this child.
